title: Surreal Five Identical Human Figures
description:
A surreal black and white portrait of five identical human figures wearing worn-out white expressionless masks, arranged in a tight symmetrical composition. The central figure holds its face with both hands, fingers pressing against the mask, conveying anxiety and emotional tension. The surrounding figures lean inward, slightly tilted, creating a layered overlapping effect. The masks have hollow eye sockets, cracked texture, and subtle dirt stains. All figures wear dark coats, blending into the shadows. Background is a rough concrete wall with minimal texture.
